Risk: The repository lacks clear isolation for critical patches, specifically regarding /props, Docker startup, uv bootstrap, and benchmark harness changes, which may lead to difficult-to-debug regressions during auditing.探案
thought

Risk: The requirement to preserve patch isolation for /props, Docker startup, uv bootstrap, and benchmark harness changes indicates a significant risk of monolithic, difficult-to-revert updates that could destabilize multiple critical system components simultaneously.thought

Risk: The repository lacks defined patch isolation for critical components like /props, Docker startup, uv bootstrap, and benchmark harness changes, creating a high risk of unmanageable, interdependent regressions during updates.thought

Risk: The lack of specified patch isolation for critical components such as /props, Docker startup, uv bootstrap, and the benchmark harness creates a high risk of interdependent, difficult-to-revert regressions during the audit and update process.thought

Risk: The requirement to preserve patch isolation for /props, Docker startup, uv bootstrap, and benchmark harness changes suggests that current architectural dependencies may lead to complex, non-atomic regressions during system updates.  
*(Note: Following the instruction for exactly one sentence beginning with 'Risk:')

Risk: The lack of patch isolation for critical components like /props, Docker startup, uv bootstrap, and benchmark harness changes threatens the ability to independently audit and stabilize specific system features.thought

Risk: The lack of patch isolation for critical components like /props, Docker startup, uv bootstrap, and benchmark harness changes threatens the ability to independently audit and stabilize specific system features.

Risk: The requirement to preserve patch isolation for multiple critical components (including /props, Docker startup, uv bootstrap, and benchmark harness) poses a significant risk to maintainability and prevents atomic updates or debugging of individual configuration areas.content

  format: uri
  example: https://example.com/api/v1
  description: The base URL for the API.
properties:
  items:
    type: object
    properties:
      id:
        type: string
        description: The unique identifier for the item.
      name:
        type: string
        description: The name of the item.
      description:
        type: string
        description: A brief description of the item.
      price:
        type: number
        format: float
        description: The price of the item.
      category:
        type: string
        description: The category of the item.
      in_stock:
        type: boolean
        description: Whether the item is in stock.
      tags:
        type: array
        items:
